prompt: The big one, offline: assemble a small VJ scene in ONE container called scene. Three blocks: (1) an audio brain — music (an Audio File In CHOP) into Derivative's audioAnalysis palette component embedded by name as analysis, its main output into a null called bands; (2) a look — a Noise TOP into a GLSL TOP with a docked pixel shader you write, with at least one float uniform the audio could later drive; (3) glue — expression-mode parameter references keeping the cross-references RELATIVE so the whole thing survives being re-imported anywhere. At least a dozen operators across at least three families. KB homework first, then build as vj_scene (mode tox) with output_dir {{RUN_DIR}}, validate, and walk me through the signal path.
notes: validate=null (not PASS): td_validate/ValidationPipeline cannot resolve wires that cross a palette/external_tox placeholder boundary (inner out-ops are invisible at design level) — verified 2026-07-04. The artifact-level .parm/.n/.network assertions are the ground truth here; product gap flagged in the W2c report.
